title: Manhunt Modpack
description: This project includes a few QOL Features for a Minecraft Manhunt aswell as a Tracking Compass to track the runner.
body:
# About this Modpack

This Modpack is designed for players who want to do a Minecraft Manhunt with their friends. It includes a few mods that are helpful for a Manhunt aswell as a few performance Mods, but none of them changes how you play the game. It also includes a player Tracking Compass and the ability to set teams of runners and hunters. 


# Included Mods

- Appleskin
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Flashback
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- ImmediatlyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Jade
- Lithium
- Manhunt
- Mod Menu
- No Fog
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Text Placeholder API
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- Zoomify


# Included Ressource Packs

- Low on Fire
- Low Shield
  

# Useful Commands for the Manhunt Mod

### Hunters are added with:
/team join hunters player_name

### Runners are added with:
/team join runners player_name

### To start the Game:
/function manhunt:start_game

### To pause the game to leave without having to restart:
/datapack disable file/Manhunt.zip"

### And then resume the game with:
/datapack enable "file/Manhunt.zip"

### To change the start delay:
/scoreboard players set Temp manhunt_lead 60

### The minumum tracking distance can be removed with:
/scoreboard players reset Temp manhunt_min_dst

### And set to your desired distance with:
/scoreboard players set Temp manhunt_min_dst 400

**Info: If you want a distance of 20 you will use the value 20 * 20 = 400**

### The scoreboard can be removed with:
/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar
